recommendation_reason: v1 outperforms v2 on ambiguous/inferential queries due to few-shot examples; both versions tie on all other query types

summary.known_issue: google.generativeai package deprecated — migrate to google.genai before deployment

queries.label: Full explicit description
queries.input: A 2005-built home in StoneBr, 2400 sqft living area, excellent exterior and kitchen, good basement and fireplace quality, 2 full baths, 600 sqft garage, 1200 sqft basement, 200 sqft masonry veneer. Overall quality 8.
queries.note: Both versions identical on fully explicit input

queries.label: Sparse — almost no info
queries.input: A small house in the Old Town neighborhood.
queries.note: Both correctly returned null instead of hallucinating — desired behavior

queries.label: Ambiguous — indirect references
queries.input: Looking for a newer home, something built in the 2000s, near the college. I want about 2000 sqft, 2 bathrooms, and a good kitchen.
queries.note: v1 few-shot examples enabled inference of 'near the college' → CollgCr; v2 could not make this leap. year_built correctly left null despite '2000s' range hint (ambiguous — no specific year)

queries.label: Absence signals — explicit negations
queries.input: Ranch-style home, no basement, no garage, no fireplace. Built in 1965 in North Ames. About 1100 sqft, 1 bathroom, average quality overall.
queries.note: Both correctly mapped 'no X' → NA/0. kitchen_qual not mentioned in query — correctly left null. year_built correctly extracted as 1965.

action_items.item: Migrate from google.generativeai to google.genai SDK before deployment
action_items.reason: FutureWarning raised: google.generativeai support ended, no longer receiving updates/bug fixes
Superior semantic inference on ambiguous queries; no regression on other query types

action_items.item: Consider adding 'built in the Xth decade' inference example to v1 prompt
action_items.reason: Q3 shows year_built left null for '2000s' — reasonable but an example could help extract a midpoint (e.g., 2005)
